title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at Guardian Pharmacy International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at Guardian Pharmacy International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Visual Merchandiser with drive and ambition, Guardian Pharmacy International Enterprises in Mumbai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Guardian Pharmacy International Enterprises:
Guardian Pharmacy International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Planogram

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Guardian Pharmacy International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
